channel.title: Contemporary Arts Museum Houston
channel.description: Upcoming events for Contemporary Arts Museum Houston

item.title: Film Screening | FEDERAL
item.description:
Tuesday, August 25, 2026 at 9 AM

Location: The River Oaks Theatre, 2009 West Gray Street, Houston, TX, 77019

FEDERAL (2003) is a 24-hour, two-theater movie that captures the north and south façades of the 1969 Charles Luckman-designed building.

Event details

item.title: TAG Alumni Reunion and Celebration
item.description:
Friday, August 28, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: Mid Main Lofts, 3550 Main Street, Houston, TX, 77002

Past, current, and future Teacher Advisory Group (TAG) members to join us for an art-filled evening.

Event details

item.title: Public Opening | Divination: Beverly Buchanan & Dionne Lee
item.description:
Thursday, September 3, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Contemporary Arts Museum Houston, 5216 Montrose Blvd., Houston, TX, 77006

Join us for the opening of the exhibition Divination: Beverly Buchanan & Dionne Lee.

Event details

item.title: In Conversation | Dionne Lee and Rebecca Matalon
item.description:
Saturday, September 5, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Contemporary Arts Museum Houston, 5216 Montrose Blvd., Houston, TX, 77006

Join artist Dionne Lee and CAMH Senior Curator Rebecca Matalon for a discussion related to themes explored in the exhibition Divination: Bev

Event details
